title: China, not Russia, is reshaping Serbia’s path to the EU
summary_full: With Russia bogged down in Ukraine, Beijing has overtaken Moscow as the EU's main rival in Serbia
summary_public: With Russia bogged down in Ukraine, Beijing has overtaken Moscow as the EU's main rival in Serbia

RS.label: negative
RS.evidence: China, not Russia, is reshaping Serbia’s path to the EU
